title: tecoma hirsuta
intro: Tecoma hirsuta, also known as the hairy trumpet vine or yellow trumpetbush, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Bignoniaceae. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tecoma hirsuta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and fight off infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or topical creams.
